title: Oil prices rise as Trump’s Hormuz ultimatum and Iran threats keep markets on edge
summary_full: Fears over a prolonged disruption in the Strait of Hormuz have kept investors on edge as oil prices swung in volatile trading Monday.
summary_public: Fears over a prolonged disruption in the Strait of Hormuz have kept investors on edge as oil prices swung in volatile trading Monday.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran threats keep markets on edge
